General.Name: Xiabu Xiabu Catering Mgmt Co
General.Description: Xiabuxiabu Catering Management (China) Holdings Co., Ltd., an investment holding company, operates Chinese hotpot restaurants in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company owns and operates restaurants under the Xiabuxiabu brand name, and restaurants under the Coucou brand name. It also provides catering services; and sells condiment products and other goods. In addition, the company engages in the slaughtering, processing, cold storage, and sale of raw materials; and construction business. Xiabuxiabu Catering Management (China) Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. Xiabuxiabu Catering Management (China) Holdings Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Ying Qi Investments Limited.
General.Address: Suncun Industrial Development Zone, Beijing, China
